zh.Charney Basset, Berkshire, England: 英國英格蘭波克夏哈尼 巴塞特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Ashenden於1435年7月1日出生在英國波克夏朗沃斯時，她的父親William Ashendon25歲，母親Mrs. William Ashendon25歲。她與Richard Yate結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1501年3月7日在英國英格蘭波克夏哈尼 巴塞特享年65歲，埋葬在英國波克夏邦藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Ashenden于1435年7月1日出生在英国波克夏朗沃斯时，她的父亲William Ashendon25岁，母亲Mrs. William Ashendon25岁。她与Richard Yate结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1501年3月7日在英国英格兰波克夏哈尼 巴塞特享年65岁，埋葬在英国波克夏邦藍。

nameMeanings.name: Ashenden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Ashenden in Tenterden (Kent), which is recorded as Esserinden' in 1278.

variants.name: Ashington
meanings: English: (i) locative name from any of various places called Ashington (especially Lincs, Sussex), or Ashingdon (Essex). (ii) possibly a variant of Ashenden in Kent contexts; note Robt. Ashinden, 1730 in IGI (Deal, Kent).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Ashenden was born on 1 July 1435, in Longworth, Berkshire, England, her father, William Ashendon, was 25 and her mother, Mrs. William Ashendon, was 25. She married Richard Yate. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 7 March 1501, in Charney Bassett, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Buckland, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Ashenden est née le 1 juillet 1435, à Longworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, William Ashendon, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William Ashendon, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Yate. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 mars 1501, à Charney Bassett, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Buckland, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Ashenden am 1. Juli 1435 in Longworth, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Ashendon 25 und ihre Mutter Mrs. William Ashendon 25. Sie hat Richard Yate geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. März 1501 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Charney Bassett, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Buckland, Berkshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Ashendenが1435年7月1日にイギリスバークシュアイアロングウオルスで生まれた時，父William Ashendonは25歳，母Mrs. William Ashendonは25歳であった。Richard Yateと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1501年3月7日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアチャーニー バセットで65歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアブックランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Ashenden(이)가 1435년 7월 1일 영국 버크실르 론그워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Ashendon(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. William Ashendon(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Richard Yate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1501년 3월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 차니 배싯에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 벅랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Ashenden родилась 1 июля 1435 г. в местности лонгворт, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Ashendon было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William Ashendon, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Yate. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 7 марта 1501 г. в местности чарни бассетт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности буккланд, биркшир, Англия.
